method: Tier-2 validation: traceability of every incident to at least one bipolar construct; lens-consistency check across the full incident database; pairwise contradiction check among the 12 constructs; explicit holdout-set validation (incidents not used in construct elicitation must still be traceable).

holdout_set.validation_note: Retention of Note G's limitation against Babbage's pressure for stronger claims is a clean instance of structural-honesty calibration (C07) vs persuasion-optimization. The construct, derived from incidents 009 and 016, applies cleanly to this holdout instance.

Operational disengagement from the Babbage partnership while preserving the personal correspondence is a clean instance of calibrated-instrument-engineering (C10) — distinct domains configured on different terms. Construct, derived from incidents 012, 017, 020, applies cleanly.

Refusing dictation in favor of autograph composition during the Notes period is a clean instance of documentation-as-thinking-instrument (C04) vs documentation-as-record. Construct, derived from incidents 001, 002, 009, applies cleanly.

Redirecting Faraday correspondence toward frontier topics rather than accommodating his canonical interests is a clean instance of operational-target alignment (C03) vs conventional-channel credentialing. Construct, derived from incidents 004, 018, 022, applies cleanly.

Refusing to mobilize Lady Byron's network for the Notes' credentialing is a clean instance of constructed-operational-identity (C06) vs inherited-credentialing-identity. Construct, derived from incidents 012 and 023, applies cleanly.

lens_consistency.perceptual_lens_statement: Lovelace classifies any encountered domain — whether mechanical (the Difference and Analytical Engines), imaginative (flight, music, mesmerism), social-political (the Babbage partnership, the deathbed family relationships), or biographical-structural (motherhood, terminal illness) — first by its architectural form (what the structure makes possible), then by its operational variables (what the structure's variables make tractable), and constructs operational instruments calibrated to the load-bearing variables. The lens converts apparent unities into structurally distinct domains and apparent constraints into operational structures with workable variables.
lens_consistency.consistency_check_method: Each of the 28 incidents was tested against the lens statement: does Lovelace's behavior in the incident exhibit the architectural-form-first attention, the operational-variable identification, the calibrated-instrument-construction, or the structural-domain decomposition? An incident fails consistency if her behavior cannot be read through the lens.

borderline_incidents.note: The betting-system construction is the structural failure-mode of the lens — applying the architectural-form attention and operational-vehicle construction to a domain (horse-racing) where the operational fit is inadequate. The incident is read as the lens applied incorrectly rather than as inconsistent with the lens; consistency is preserved because the dispositional pattern is unchanged, only the target domain's structural fit is misjudged.

The deathbed confession to William involves emotional and relational content that the lens does not foreground; however, her decision to make explicit disclosure rather than concealment-by-default is read through the structural-honesty calibration construct (C07) and is consistent with the lens applied to a relational domain.

contradiction_check.method: Pairwise comparison of all 12 constructs to identify any pair whose positive poles produce structurally incompatible predictions in the same incident.

tension_pairs.potential_tension: C06 prescribes refusal of inherited credentialing; C10 prescribes calibrated configuration of structurally distinct domains. The deathbed burial beside Byron (incident-017) appears to deploy inherited identity, which could appear to contradict C06.
tension_pairs.resolution: C06 explicitly recognizes 'strategic invocation of the inheritance in specifically calibrated circumstances'; the burial is the calibrated-symbolic instance, configured by C10 as a distinct settlement-domain. The constructs co-operate rather than contradict: C06 governs the default credentialing-anchor, C10 governs the calibrated configuration of specific domains within the default.

tension_pairs.potential_tension: C07 prescribes principled co-articulation of capability and limitation; C10 prescribes configuration of distinct domains on different terms. The 'A.A.L.' signaling (incident-012) configures the same artifact's authorship for different audiences, which could appear to compromise C07's structural-honesty.
tension_pairs.resolution: C07 governs claims about the world (capability vs limitation); C10 governs signaling about the self across audiences. The two operate on distinct axes and do not contradict. The 'A.A.L.' signaling preserves structural-honesty in the underlying claims while calibrating audience-asymmetric resolvability of authorship.

holdout_validation.method: The 5 holdout incidents (024–028) were not used in the elicitation of any construct. Each holdout incident must be traceable to at least one construct, and the trace must be operationally clean (the construct must apply on its operational signature, not by stretch).

tier_2_verdict.rationale: Traceability at 100% (28/28 incidents covered), well above the 80% threshold. Lens consistency check passes across all 28 incidents (two borderline cases — the betting-system and the deathbed confession — read as lens-applied-with-misjudged-fit and lens-extended-to-relational-domain respectively, both consistent with the lens). Pairwise contradiction check identifies two construct-pair tensions (C06/C10 and C07/C10), both resolved by recognition that the constructs operate on distinct axes. Holdout validation: all 5 holdout incidents trace cleanly to constructs not derived from them. Framework is internally consistent and externally validated against the holdout set.
tier_2_verdict.construct_count_validation: 12 constructs, at the cap requested. Each construct is bipolar with operationally specified poles, derives from at least 2 incidents, and applies to at least one additional incident on its operational signature. No single-trait constructs.
